en_title: Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Leak Reveals More Than 100 Scrapped Designs, Including Unseen Creatures and Missing Evolutions
cn_title: 《宝可梦 钻石／珍珠》泄露逾百个废弃设计，包括未公开宝可梦与进化形态
subtitle: 失传纪录片重见天日

paragraphs.en: Pokémon Diamond and Pearl fans are celebrating the unofficial reveal of more than 100 previously-unseen designs, including early drafts of known creatures, numerous scrapped species, and cut evolutions.
paragraphs.cn: 《宝可梦 钻石／珍珠》粉丝正在庆祝超过100个从未公开的设计非正式曝光，其中包括已知宝可梦的早期草案、大量废弃物种，以及被删除的进化形态。

paragraphs.en: Evidence of a discarded Delibird and Kecleon evolutions, Stantler and Lapras pre-evolutions, plus what look like a baby Plusle and Minun are all briefly seen. Completely cut Pokémon include creatures based on a crane, crickets, snails, molluscs, goats, mice, a platypus, and a swordfish can also be seen, as well as plants such as beansprouts and clover. There's even different designs for the region's starter Pokémon, such as a foam-headed Water-type dog, and a Grass-type wolf.
paragraphs.cn: 画面中短暂出现了被废弃的信使鸟和变隐龙进化形态、惊角鹿和拉普拉斯的进化前形态，以及疑似幼年正电拍拍与负电拍拍的设计。完全遭到删除的宝可梦还包括以鹤、蟋蟀、蜗牛、软体动物、山羊、老鼠、鸭嘴兽和剑鱼为原型的生物，以及豆芽、三叶草等植物造型。当地初始宝可梦也有不同设计，例如头顶泡沫的水属性犬和草属性狼。

paragraphs.en: The source of these designs is a long-lost documentary made by Pokémon developer Game Freak that has never previously been seen in public. Made for the game's own staff as a record of their work, the film was originally handed out to employees on DVDs, who were sworn to keeping it private.
paragraphs.cn: 这些设计源自一部失传已久、此前从未公开亮相的纪录片，由宝可梦开发商Game Freak制作。影片是为游戏员工记录工作而拍摄，最初以DVD形式发给员工，并要求他们承诺保密。

paragraphs.en: Now, 20 years later, the documentary has finally been obtained, and painstakingly sifted through by a team of fans — with the best archive of the material found on Lewtwo . The full documentary itself can also now be seen on YouTube (for now) and more permanently via the Internet Archive .
paragraphs.cn: 20年后的今天，这部纪录片终于被人取得，并由一支粉丝团队仔细梳理；目前最完整的资料归档可在Lewtwo处找到。纪录片完整版眼下也能在YouTube观看，并由互联网档案馆提供更长期的保存版本。
废弃的信使鸟进化形态pic.twitter.com/CyGP2thilM
废弃的水属性初始宝可梦pic.twitter.com/1OO5j0VD7B

paragraphs.en: EVEN MORE NEVER BEFORE SEEN BETA POKÉMON pic.twitter.com/i8PXnoYwnl
paragraphs.cn: 更多从未公开的宝可梦测试版设计pic.twitter.com/i8PXnoYwnl

paragraphs.en: As you might expect, fan excitement around the documentary's contents is huge — thanks to fact that the film was made originally for Game Freak staff, and is completely unfiltered in the content it shows. Game Freak guards its Pokémon design process with enormous secrecy, and it's unlikely this documentary would even be made today.
paragraphs.cn: 不出所料，纪录片内容让粉丝无比兴奋，因为影片原本只供Game Freak员工观看，展示的内容完全未经筛选。Game Freak对宝可梦设计流程极度保密，如今恐怕连这样的纪录片都不会再拍。

paragraphs.en: For many fans, the creation of games such as Pokémon Diamond and Pearl is something to be explored and celebrated, as a part of gaming's history that they want to see preserved. Of course, there's natural interest in the many, many Pokémon designs that have been left on the cutting room floor, but also a peek behind the curtain at the series' development. The documentary includes almost an hour of footage shot within Game Freak's offices, showing employees alternately working and goofing around, and the process used to design the Sinnoh region — from sketches to paper maps to real-world models made using blocks.
paragraphs.cn: 对许多粉丝而言，《宝可梦 钻石／珍珠》等游戏的创作过程值得探索和庆祝，也是他们希望得到保存的游戏史。大家自然会对大量被舍弃的宝可梦设计感兴趣，同时也能借此窥见系列幕后开发。纪录片包含近一小时在Game Freak办公室拍摄的画面，展示员工时而工作、时而玩闹，以及神奥地区从草图、纸质地图到积木搭建实体模型的设计过程。

paragraphs.en: With such enormous secrecy around the creation of new Pokémon games, chances to get a peek behind the curtain are few and far between. The only release of scrapped Pokémon details to rival this in recent years has been the infamous Pokémon Teraleak , which originated in an illegal hack of data from Game Freak's internal servers.
paragraphs.cn: 由于新宝可梦游戏的创作受到严密保密，外界几乎没有机会窥见幕后。近年来，唯一能与此次曝光相提并论的废弃宝可梦资料，是臭名昭著的宝可梦大规模泄露事件；其资料来自对Game Freak内部服务器数据的非法入侵。

paragraphs.en: Even 20 years on, there's even clues to Pokémon that may feature in future. New Pokémon generations have regularly featured updated versions of previously-cut designs (and indeed, the documentary shows creatures that strongly resemble the finished looks of Rowlet and Sandygast, finally released years later). One particular design here catches the eye — a yellow Shellos. This is a creature fans expect to pop up in next year's Pokémon Winds and Waves for Switch 2, after mention of it in this year's Pokémon Pokopia.
paragraphs.cn: 即使过去20年，资料中仍藏着未来可能登场宝可梦的线索。历代新作经常采用过去废弃设计的改良版本；纪录片中就有一些生物与多年后正式推出的木木枭和沙丘娃十分相似。其中一个设计格外引人注意——黄色无壳海兔。今年的《宝可梦Pokopia》提到它后，粉丝预计这只宝可梦会在明年登陆Switch 2的《宝可梦 风与波》中现身。

summary: 一部原本仅供Game Freak员工观看的《宝可梦 钻石／珍珠》开发纪录片在20年后曝光，展示超过100个废弃或未公开设计，包括信使鸟、变隐龙的进化形态及多种全新生物。资料还可能暗示未来作品中的宝可梦。
opus_summary: 失传20年的Game Freak内部纪录片让《宝可梦 钻石／珍珠》的创作过程重见天日。超过100个早期与废弃设计不仅补全了游戏史，也可能藏着未来《宝可梦 风与波》的角色线索。
